sprint: Sprint 3 follow-up — Undo Trim visibility fix
task: Reported: 'undo trim option does not work.' Root cause traced: applyManualCrop() (and the new applyTrimTrash()) called setActiveTool('pan') right after applying, which hides the entire Trim Picture sub-panel -- including Undo Trim -- since that panel only shows while the Trim Picture tool is active. The button was never actually broken, just invisible the instant a child would want to click it. Fixed by staying in the Trim Picture tool after Apply instead of switching to pan, so the panel (Trash It / Keep This / Undo Trim / Oops!) stays visible and usable right where it was just used. Verified via Playwright, reproducing the exact reported scenario before and after the fix, plus a real click-through of Undo Trim restoring the canvas. Full regression suite unchanged.
